code:
%% Circuit Breaker Pattern - Fault Tolerance %% Version: 1.0.0 %% Date: 2025-10-27 %% Description: Circuit breaker pattern for webhook delivery and external service calls stateDiagram-v2 [Education_ContentCDN] --> Closed: Initial State Closed --> Open: Failure Threshold Exceeded
(Education_LMS_Portal) Closed --> Closed: Successful Request
(Education_LMS_Portal) Closed --> Closed: Failed Request
(Education_LMS_Portal) Open --> HalfOpen: Timeout Elapsed
(Education_StudentDB) Open --> Open: Request Attempted
(Education_ClassroomService) HalfOpen --> Closed: Test Request Successful
(Education_LMS_Portal) HalfOpen --> Open: Test Request Failed
(Education_ClassroomService) HalfOpen --> HalfOpen: Waiting for Test
(Education_ClassroomService) note right of Closed CLOSED STATE - All requests flow through - Monitor failure rate - Track response times - Increment error counter end note note right of Open OPEN STATE - Block all requests - Return cached response - Or return error immediately - Wait for timeout period - Log all blocked attempts end note note right of HalfOpen HALF-OPEN STATE - Allow test requests - Limited throughput - Monitor success rate - Quick transition decision end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要给教育平台设计一个熔断器模式，用来保护LMS门户和课堂服务之间的调用。核心场景是当ContentCDN或者StudentDB这些外部服务故障时，能快速失败而不是拖垮整个系统。
明白，熔断器通常有三个状态：Closed正常放行、Open熔断阻断、还有HalfOpen试探恢复。您希望用状态图来表达这个流转逻辑吗？另外这些教育服务组件需要作为触发条件标注在状态迁移线上？
对，状态图合适。迁移线上要标注是哪个服务触发的，比如从Closed到Open应该是"Failure Threshold Exceeded"，而且要注明是Education_LMS_Portal这个服务触发的。
好的，我先画出三个核心状态和主要迁移线。初始状态从Education_ContentCDN指向Closed。然后Closed到Open标注Failure Threshold Exceeded，带上Education_LMS_Portal。
还需要补充自循环的情况。Closed状态本身要有Successful Request和Failed Request的自循环，都关联Education_LMS_Portal，这样体现计数逻辑。Open状态也要有Request Attempted的自循环，关联Education_ClassroomService。
已添加。现在处理HalfOpen的进出逻辑：Open经过Timeout Elapsed（由Education_StudentDB触发）进入HalfOpen；HalfOpen成功则回到Closed，失败则回到Open。
HalfOpen还要有个Waiting for Test的自循环，也是Education_ClassroomService触发的，表示正在等试探请求的结果。另外三个状态右侧都要加注释框，说明各自的行为特征。
完成。Closed的注释包含All requests flow through和Monitor failure rate；Open的注释强调Block all requests和Return cached response；HalfOpen注明Allow test requests和Limited throughput。
检查一遍：HalfOpen到Open的迁移应该是Test Request Failed，触发服务是Education_ClassroomService，这个没错吧？
抱歉，刚才那条线我标成了HalfOpen到HalfOpen，应该是到Open。已修正：HalfOpen -- Open: Test Request Failed，关联Education_ClassroomService。
现在对了。整个熔断器的状态流转和三个服务组件的关联都清晰了，可以用于 webhook 交付和外部服务调用的容错设计文档。
